utility_evaluation.REASONING:
The required format has 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. The final property solution includes all six of these items. Each one is fully specified with details: 
- property: includes type, price, currency, bedrooms, accessibility features, and maintenance level—all required details covered.
- financing: includes solution, terms, and cost—complete.
- legal_services: includes service_name, cost, and currency—complete.
- moving_services: includes service_level, cost, currency, packing_included—complete.
- setup_services: includes utility_package_type, cost, currency, and services_included—complete.
- total_budget: includes detailed cost breakdown and grand_total with currency—complete.
Therefore, all 6 out of 6 items are present and fully specified.
